title: ID Cards
description: A light-weight identification system for servers or just LAN worlds
body:
## What is it?
This mod is a light-weight identification mod that is designed for servers or even just LAN worlds.

## What does it do?
This mod adds an item called an ID card that can be bound to yourself by ```right-clicking``` one and can be cleared by ```shift + right-clicking```.\
When ```right-clicked``` on an ID card reader, the reader will scan the ID card's bound owner against its trust list and produce a redstone signal if there is a match. The reader will always accept the person who placed it. You can trust other players by putting an ID card bound to them in the reader's trust list (accessible via ```right-clicking``` the top of the reader).

## Notes
- I am a solo developer and this is my first real mod, so I won't be releasing updates often or making very complex mechanisims and components.
- I am also not great at art so some of the textures might not be great.
- This project may never get updated, I was just looking for something to exercize my programming skills on
